verification_method.svg: XML parsed independently; source SVG geometry and rendered previews inspected.
verification_method.rendered_geometry: Inkscape --query-id on title-block and flexible venue values.
verification_method.contrast: WCAG relative-luminance computation from source token hex values.

verified_claims.title_panel_repair: pass: title ends x=691.262; panel starts x=760; gap=68.738px
verified_claims.venue_overset: fail: HUB A + WEB ends x=779.358, 3.358px beyond outer card edge x=776

defects: Fixed compact metadata budget is disproven by a supplied variant.
Fixed badge and title capacity rules remain unproven.
synthesis-01.parent_comparison: Improves generative-02 contrast, metadata semantics, and title/graphic zoning; adds a more bespoke brand object to editorial-02, but introduces a reusable-state containment failure.

verified_claims.title_panel_repair: pass: title ends x=640.484; panel starts x=752; gap=111.516px
verified_claims.venue_overset_repair: pass: stress venue ends x=289.239 with 82.761px before inner edge x=372

defects: Localization, RTL, and non-Latin expansion are untested.
Fallback-font variation is untested outside the inspected rendering environment.
Two-line badge-overflow behavior is specified but not rendered.
synthesis-02.parent_comparison: Retains editorial-02's hierarchy and explicit metadata while retaining generative-02's routing identity; materially resolves both parent CTA/title risks and Loop 01's venue overset.

preference: synthesis-02 for inspected layout quality and system resilience only
promotion: none; this is an independent critique, not a promotion decision
explicit_dissent: Synthesis-02 passes only the inspected English, system-font evidence. It should not be read as proof of localization or production-environment resilience. Synthesis-01's strong display card does not offset its visible compact-system failure.
